name: quorvex-ai
description: Quorvex AI — Intelligent test automation platform that converts natural language specifications into production-ready Playwright tests.

scripts.test:e2e:workflow-base-url: sh -c 'PLAYWRIGHT_START_WEB_SERVER=true BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} API_BASE=${API_BASE:-http://localhost:8001} PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/workflow-creation.spec.ts tests/e2e/project-base-url-defaults.spec.ts --project=${PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT:-chromium} --workers=1'
scripts.test:e2e:browser-auth-sessions: sh -c 'PLAYWRIGHT_START_WEB_SERVER=true BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} API_BASE=${API_BASE:-http://localhost:8001} PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/browser-auth-sessions.spec.ts --project=${PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT:-chromium} --workers=1'
scripts.test:e2e:autopilot-checklist: sh -c 'PLAYWRIGHT_START_WEB_SERVER=true BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} API_BASE=${API_BASE:-http://localhost:8001} PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/autopilot-checklist.spec.ts --project=${PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT:-chromium} --workers=1'
scripts.test:e2e:stable-openapi: sh -c 'PLAYWRIGHT_START_WEB_SERVER=true BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} API_BASE=${API_BASE:-http://localhost:8001} PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/openapi-import.spec.ts --project=${PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT:-chromium} --workers=1'
scripts.test:e2e:memory: sh -c 'PLAYWRIGHT_START_WEB_SERVER=true BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} API_BASE=${API_BASE:-http://localhost:8001} PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/memory.spec.ts --project=${PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT:-chromium} --workers=1'
scripts.test:e2e:stable-coverage: sh -c 'PLAYWRIGHT_START_WEB_SERVER=true BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} API_BASE=${API_BASE:-http://localhost:8001} PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/coverage-intelligence.spec.ts --project=${PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT:-chromium} --workers=1'
scripts.test:e2e:stable-pr-advisor: sh -c 'PLAYWRIGHT_START_WEB_SERVER=true BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} API_BASE=${API_BASE:-http://localhost:8001} PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/pr-advisor.spec.ts --project=${PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT:-chromium} --workers=1'
scripts.test:e2e:stable-agents: sh -c 'PLAYWRIGHT_START_WEB_SERVER=true BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} API_BASE=${API_BASE:-http://localhost:8001} PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/agents.spec.ts --project=${PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT:-chromium} --workers=1'
scripts.test:e2e:stable-test-data: sh -c 'PLAYWRIGHT_START_WEB_SERVER=true BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} API_BASE=${API_BASE:-http://localhost:8001} PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/test-data.spec.ts --project=${PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT:-chromium} --workers=1'
scripts.test:e2e:stable-mocked: npm run test:e2e:stable-openapi && npm run test:e2e:memory && npm run test:e2e:stable-coverage && npm run test:e2e:stable-pr-advisor && npm run test:e2e:stable-agents && npm run test:e2e:stable-test-data && npm run test:e2e:stable-custom-workflow

author: Nihad Mammadli
